matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Dekker deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Lunaria: their 3s all-in loses 30% of its bite; you give up 7% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Phase's main threat is Energy Lance; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Lunaria: their 3s all-in loses 27% of its bite; you give up 7% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Riktor ramps on auto-attacks — pressure them before they itemize, and mixed resist blunts them later.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Lunaria: their 3s all-in loses 25% of its bite; you give up 7% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your kill threat peaks early-to-mid: cash it in before their later items level the exchange. Adele deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Lunaria: their 3s all-in loses 37% of its bite; you give up 7% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Mourn's main threat is Abduct; bait it before you commit, and mixed resist softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Lunaria: their 3s all-in loses 31% of its bite; you give up 7% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Narbash deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Void Helm instead of Lunaria: their 3s all-in loses 30% of its bite; you give up 7% of your damage.

laneSteer.provenance: “Terminal Treatment” ⇒ on-hit; the sim can’t model this augment — steered by the declared playstyle + field evidence — field support 48.5% over 904 games, magnitude not simulated.

laneSteer.provenance: “Terminal Treatment” ⇒ on-hit; the sim can’t model this augment — steered by the declared playstyle + field evidence — field midlane 54.6% over 295 games, magnitude not simulated.

flags: crests and consumables not yet in the build model; augments with tractable mechanics are simulated, the rest are listed unmodeled
